questions.question: Each excel file is a workbook that contains different sheets. Which of the following cannot be a sheet in workbook?
What is the shortcut key to replace a data with another is sheet ?
If you need a text to show vertically in a cell. How will you achieve this ?
options: choose vertical on text alignment in format cells dialog box.
choose 90 degrees in orientation of format cells dialog box.
choose distributed from the vertical drop down list of format cells dialog box.
choose center across selection from horizontal combo box in format cells dialog box.

questions.question: Where can you set the shedding color for a range of cells in excel?
options: choose required color form patterns tab of format cells dialog box
choose required color on fill color tool in formatting toolbar
choose required color on fill color tool in drawing toolbar

options: mouse pointer with anchor at the tip
